summary: Added a pure read-only provider L0 summary invariant validator. validate_provider_l0_invariants checks the current provider summary l0_candidates, l0_included, and l0_dropped structure using actual implemented fields: cid, citation, inclusion_reason, token_cost, and dropped_reason. The validator enforces list/object shape, non-empty cid, non-negative integer token_cost, optional non-empty citation, inclusion/dropped reason exclusivity, duplicate cid detection, included subset of candidates, included/dropped disjointness, over_budget drops tied to candidates, and current dropped_reason values not_found and over_budget. This does not alter provider summary output, prompt assembly, context packs, L0 store loading, L0 creation, or CLI behavior. Full suite passed with 235 tests.
